apps.name: Captioneer
apps.subtitle: Live translated captions for OBS and on-screen overlays
apps.description: A privacy-first macOS app for on-device transcription, translation, and live overlay captions.
apps.longDescription: Captioneer is a macOS menu bar app that listens to your microphone, transcribes speech on-device, translates it in real time, and renders the latest lines in a configurable overlay. It can also publish live caption text to a local file for OBS workflows, making it useful for streams, recordings, and presentations.
features: On-device speech recognition with real-time translation
Top, bottom, or floating caption overlays
Live text-file output for OBS caption overlays
Menu bar controls with privacy-first local processing
